examples: My husband and I met on a blind date at a skeet [clay pigeon] shooting party.
And my Dad's on the roof skeet shooting her Franklin Mint collectible plates.
According to Tim Skeet at Merrill Lynch, the first issues could well happen before the end of the year.
Desmond Davies of Wales won the skeet title on the last day of shooting.
Obama: Yes, in fact, up at Camp David, we do skeet shooting all the time.
